name: EPLUS INC
business: ePlus is a leading IT solutions provider in AI, cloud, data center, security, networking, and collaboration. It sells third-party hardware, software, and maintenance, as well as professional and managed services. Customers include middle-market to large enterprises across telecom, media & entertainment, healthcare, SLED, technology, financial services, and retail.
sellsTo: State and local government and educational institutions (SLED)

catalysts.event: Completed sale of domestic financing business to Marlin Leasing Corporation
catalysts.sentence: On June 30, 2025, we completed the sale of 100% of the membership interests of Expo Holdings, LLC, a Delaware limited liability company and our wholly-owned subsidiary ( HoldCo ), to Marlin Leasing Corporation, a Delaware corporation (d/b/a PEAC Solutions) pursuant to the terms of the Membership Interest Purchase Agreement, dated June 20, 2025 (the Sale Transaction ).

catalysts.event: Quarterly dividend of $0.27 per share to be paid
catalysts.sentence: The quarterly cash dividend of $0.27 per common share will be paid on June 30, 2026, to stockholders of record as of the close of business on June 17, 2026.
